statement.en: Highthroughput in situ sizing and quantum yield determination of individual perovskite nanocrystals
statement.summary: Data set for the manuscript of the same title. Contains raw data in the form of tiff files and extracted values used for further analysis and generating the figures (generally .xlsx files).

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: This is a dataset descriptor for experimental materials science research (perovskite nanocrystals). The axiom itself is not a truth claim but a provisional data collection artifact. The manuscript exists in future tense (2026-04-25), suggesting preprint/accepted-but-not-published status. Experimental datasets are inherently provisional—their validity depends on peer review validation, reproducibility verification, and methodological scrutiny not yet complete.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 個々の結晶の中で、発光効率は吸収と放出の深さの比として生まれる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 光の粒子が結晶の層を透き通り、内側の発光核へ螺旋状に降りていく。
